response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and a passion for open-source projects, but his experience lacks depth in C++ for industrial automation and secure development practices, which are critical for this role. His background in TypeScript, Node.js, and web technologies is extensive but not directly aligned with the core requirements of high-performance C++ systems and industrial cybersecurity standards.
strengths: Extensive experience with event-driven architectures and distributed systems, relevant to message-broker-based applications.
Proven leadership in mentoring teams and organizing technical workshops, indicating strong collaboration and knowledge-sharing skills.
Diverse technical background with exposure to multiple languages (D, Java, C++) and frameworks, showcasing adaptability and problem-solving abilities.
concerns: Limited recent hands-on experience with C++ and STL, which are core requirements for this role.
No explicit mention of secure development lifecycle (SDL) or industrial cybersecurity standards (e.g., IEC 62443) in the resume.
Primary expertise lies in web and full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, React), which may not translate directly to industrial automation or embedded systems.
